Complete body and mind wellness.

More Than Yoga—A Complete Wellness Experience.Join Jaipur's trusted yoga studio for personalized yoga, meditation, Zumba, therapeutic sessions, and holistic wellness programs led by Namrta Jain.

Book Free Trial Explore Classes

Welcome to Let's MoveOn Yoga

We believe wellness is more than just physical fitness—it's about creating harmony between your mind, body, and soul. Led by Namrta Jain, our studio offers personalized yoga, meditation, therapeutic sessions, and holistic wellness programs in a calm and welcoming environment. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced practitioner, every class is designed to help you grow stronger, healthier, and more balanced.

Meet Namrta Jain

Our Offerings

A holistic approach to your practice.

Group Classes

Experience personalized yoga sessions that enhance flexibility, build strength, reduce stress, and nurture complete physical and mental well-being—perfect for every age and every level.

View Details

Private Sessions

One-on-one guidance to focus on your specific physical and mental wellness goals.

Book a Session

Workshops & Retreats

Enhance your well-being through guided yoga, meditation, and wellness sessions designed to support a healthier lifestyle.

Explore Events

Why Choose Us

A practice designed entirely around your well-being.

Certified Instructor

Expert guidance from an MA in Yoga & DNYS certified professional.

Flexible Timings

Morning and evening batches to suit your busy schedule.

Personal Attention

Small batch sizes ensuring focus on individual progress and alignment.

Peaceful Environment

A calm, unhurried studio sanctuary designed for deep focus.

Affordable Pricing

Premium wellness experiences kept accessible for everyone.

Online & Offline

Practice in our studio or from the comfort of your home.

Ready to begin?

Join our warm community in Jaipur and take the first step toward complete body and mind wellness.
